scopeNote: SYBEORG only. No outbound without Stark approval.

policy.primaryRule: First batch should prioritize businesses with no real website, no Google/Maps website link, a coming-soon/placeholder page, or a broken public website path.
policy.mockupRule: Use mockup outreach only when the current public web presence is missing, broken, placeholder, or clearly weaker than our sample. Strong-site prospects move to audit/campaign/video angle instead.

firstBatchRecommendation.currentWebPresence: no website field found in OSM/public listing pass
firstBatchRecommendation.whyFirstBatch: Has public email plus no website signal, so this is the cleanest no-website email test candidate.
firstBatchRecommendation.subject: quick first-site idea for CPC Performance
firstBatchRecommendation.draftCopy:
Hi CPC Performance team — I’m Majid with SYBEORG here in Iowa. I came across your Des Moines listing and didn’t see a website attached in the public listing data I checked. For an auto performance/repair shop, even a simple mobile page can help people confirm the address, hours, services, and tap to call before they choose where to go.

If useful, I can send over a no-obligation sample first-site concept for CPC with your phone, address, hours, and a clean mobile call path. Worth a quick look? Reply NO and I won’t follow up.

firstBatchRecommendation.contactRoute: phone/manual research; no public email yet
firstBatchRecommendation.whyFirstBatch: Current site is effectively a placeholder; mockup is appropriate and already built.
firstBatchRecommendation.recommendedOffer: replace coming-soon page with useful one-page site
firstBatchRecommendation.subject: sample replacement for Premier Plumbing’s coming-soon page
firstBatchRecommendation.draftCopy:
Hi Premier Plumbing team — I was looking at Ankeny plumbing listings and saw the public Premier Plumbing website loading as a short 'Coming Soon' page. It does show a phone number, but it does not give homeowners much context before they choose who to call.

I put together a no-obligation sample one-page concept showing how the first screen could make the phone number, service categories, and request path clearer: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/premier-plumbing-ankeny/

Worth polishing this up for you? Reply NO and I will not follow up.

firstBatchRecommendation.currentWebPresence: no website button visible in public Maps view from earlier pass
firstBatchRecommendation.contactRoute: phone/manual research; no public email yet
firstBatchRecommendation.evidenceQuality: good; verified in 2026-06-19 batch but should re-check before contact
firstBatchRecommendation.whyFirstBatch: Strong no-website signal and mockup already built.
firstBatchRecommendation.subject: sample first website for Grenell Tree Service
firstBatchRecommendation.draftCopy:
Hi Grenell Tree Service team — I came across your Iowa City-area listing and saw a strong local signal, but I did not see a website button in the public Maps view. For tree work, a simple mobile page can help people quickly confirm services and call when they have a limb, removal, or cleanup issue.

I put together a no-obligation first-site concept with the phone number, service categories, and a fast estimate/call path: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/grenell-tree-service/

Worth polishing this up for you? Reply NO and I will not follow up.

firstBatchRecommendation.currentWebPresence: listed URL returned SITE NOT FOUND during 2026-06-19 fetch
firstBatchRecommendation.contactRoute: phone/manual research; no public email yet
firstBatchRecommendation.evidenceQuality: strong for broken-site issue; needs services/photos verification before mockup
firstBatchRecommendation.whyFirstBatch: Broken public site path is close to no-site and creates a helpful outreach hook.
firstBatchRecommendation.recommendedOffer: fix not-found site / simple service-area page
firstBatchRecommendation.subject: quick website not-found note for Arriaga Lawn Maintenance
firstBatchRecommendation.draftCopy:
Hi Arriaga Lawn Maintenance team — quick helpful note: the public website URL I found for Arriaga Lawn Maintenance loaded a 'SITE NOT FOUND' page. If that is the listing customers are clicking from search, it may be blocking people before they see your services or phone number.

I did not send anything or make changes — just flagging it. If useful, I can have SYBEORG mock up a simple lawn-care/service-area page so you can see the cleaner version. Worth a quick look? Reply NO and I will not follow up.

firstBatchRecommendation.currentWebPresence: listed/searched domain failed DNS resolution in earlier pass
firstBatchRecommendation.contactRoute: phone/manual verification; no public email yet
firstBatchRecommendation.evidenceQuality: needs manual Google Maps verification before naming domain
firstBatchRecommendation.whyFirstBatch: HVAC urgency plus dead-domain signal, but verify source before contact.
firstBatchRecommendation.subject: quick domain/listing note for Fini Conditioned Air
firstBatchRecommendation.draftCopy:
Hi Fini Conditioned Air team — quick helpful note: I tried the public domain I found for Fini Conditioned Air and it did not resolve. If that domain is still connected to any customer-facing listing, people may be hitting a dead end before they can request HVAC help.

I can mock up a simple replacement call-first HVAC page if you want to see what a cleaner first screen could look like. Worth a quick look? Reply NO and I will not follow up.

strongSiteOrNonFirstBatch.reason: Current site is stronger than our mockup; do not use generic mockup outreach.
strongSiteOrNonFirstBatch.futureAngle: conversion audit / paid ads landing page / video campaign / SEO service-page expansion

strongSiteOrNonFirstBatch.reason: Functional existing site; not a no-website target.
strongSiteOrNonFirstBatch.futureAngle: profile/service path cleanup or seasonal campaign

strongSiteOrNonFirstBatch.reason: Functional site; strongest angle is reputation/profile cleanup rather than mockup.

nextActions: Verify CPC Performance on Google Maps / Google Business Profile before building or sending.
Research public emails/contact forms for Premier, Grenell, Arriaga, and Fini; otherwise prepare phone/DM scripts.
Build CPC mockup if verification confirms no website link.
Use Premier and Grenell existing mockups as the first manual outreach tests.
Move strong-site prospects into separate audit/campaign/video angle board.
